reviewed_items.reviewer_notes: Gate 3 (Scope Check) triggered. The vulnerability is only reachable via Beacon API handler (beacon-chain/rpc/eth/beacon/handlers.go:1090, called from validateBlobs in validateConsensus). Only one non-test caller exists. Per BUG_BOUNTY_SCOPE.json conditional_scope (lines 135-142), vulnerabilities requiring publicly exposed Beacon API are explicitly out-of-scope. The finding describes a missing bounds check on c-kzg-4844 library output, but the attack requires submitting blocks via the Beacon API endpoint, which requires the user to have publicly exposed this API.
